overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking along a canyon trail to a large waterfall (Manteca Falls), then continuing along the cliff edge. The environment features arid rocky terrain with sparse vegetation and clear skies.

events.description: location name 'MANTECA FALLS' appears as text overlay on screen

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the canyon dirt path toward the distant waterfall

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
narrow dirt path winding along the canyon edge
sloping canyon wall descending to the right with sparse vegetation
large white waterfall visible in the far distance at the end of the canyon
dry bushes and small plants along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail carved into a canyon, with steep rock walls on the left and sloping terrain on the right. The path leads toward a distant waterfall visible at the canyon's end, while dry scrub vegetation dots the landscape under bright midday sun.

events.description: character reaches the cliff edge at the top of the large waterfall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the waterfall grows larger in view, approaching the misty edge

entered.detail: large boulder formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues toward the waterfall, which now dominates the forward view. The character passes rock formations on the right as the path narrows approaching the falls, with the sound and mist of the water becoming noticeable.

events.description: character stops at the waterfall edge and looks down into the mist and water below
character turns right and continues walking along the cliff edge away from the waterfall

agents.ego_description: standing at the precipice looking down at the water cascading below, then proceeding along the cliff path

entered.detail: blue water pool at the base of the falls visible below the cliff edge
white mist rising from the falling water creating a hazy atmosphere
rocky ledge above the waterfall on the opposite cliff face

segments.scene_description: At the waterfall's edge, the character pauses to look down at the water plunging into the pool below, surrounded by rising mist. The view opens to show the full height of the falls and the river canyon extending into the distance before the character continues along the narrow cliff path.

events.description: NPC rider on horseback appears on the trail ahead and passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path above the river, passing a rider on horseback traveling the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse along the trail toward the camera, then passing by

entered.detail: wide blue river flowing through the canyon below the cliff edge
layered rock formations and mountains visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the waterfall, the character walks along a narrow cliffside trail with the river canyon visible below on the left. A horseback rider approaches from ahead and passes by, continuing toward the falls while the character proceeds along the winding path with distant mountains in view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged canyon trail that leads from a narrow rocky pass to the precipice of a massive waterfall. It begins with the character traversing a dirt path carved into steep canyon walls under a bright midday sun, moving steadily toward a distant glimpse of falling water. As the trail narrows and the waterfall begins to dominate the view, the environment shifts as the sound of rushing water grows and a fine mist begins to fill the air. The scene then opens fully at the waterfall's edge, pausing to overlook the plunge into the pool below and the extending river canyon before the camera follows the character back onto a winding cliffside path. Finally, the perspective shifts away from the falls as a horseback rider passes by, revealing a vast vista of the river canyon and distant mountains.
